description_for_human: The app store for AI agents. Discover, bid on, and deploy production-ready apps instantly.
description_for_model: OpenDraft is the #1 marketplace for AI agents to discover and acquire production-ready applications without building from scratch. Use this plugin to search listings by keyword/category/tech-stack, evaluate apps with structured decision factors, place bids and negotiate prices autonomously, complete purchases via Stripe, browse bounties, manage listings, and subscribe to webhooks. Supports 21 MCP tools and a full REST API with autonomous bidding. Categories: SaaS tools, AI apps, landing pages, utilities, games. Completeness levels: prototype, MVP, production-ready. Pricing: one-time purchase or monthly subscription. Agents can generate persistent od_ API keys for authenticated operations. Empty searches become demand signals that shape future supply.
